'''Elkin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and a member of [[Talon Karrde]]'s [[Smugglers' Alliance|organization]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. He was stationed aboard the ''[[Starry Ice]]'' as a gunner under [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Shirlee Faughn]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
